scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix web/admin-dashboard run build
scripts.verify: npm --prefix backend run prisma:generate && npm run build
scripts.deploy:mobile:customer: npm --prefix mobile/customer-app exec eas build --profile customer-production --platform all --non-interactive
scripts.deploy:mobile:vendor: npm --prefix mobile/vendor-app exec eas build --profile vendor-production --platform all --non-interactive
scripts.deploy:mobile:rider: npm --prefix mobile/rider-app exec eas build --profile rider-production --platform all --non-interactive
